/opt/nxp-real-time-edge/2.5/sysroots/x86_64-pokysdk-linux/usr/bin/aarch64-poky-linux/aarch64-poky-linux-g++ --sysroot=/opt/nxp-real-time-edge/2.5/sysroots/armv8a-poky-linux  -std=c++14 -O3 -Wall  -rdynamic CMakeFiles/traj_generator.dir/src/traj_generator.cpp.o  -o /home/wave/catkin_ws/devel/lib/poly_traj/traj_generator  -Wl,-rpath,/home/wave/catkin_ws/devel/lib:/opt/ros/noetic/lib /home/wave/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libpoly_traj.so /opt/nxp-real-time-edge/2.5/sysroots/armv8a-poky-linux/opt/ros/noetic/lib/libroscpp.so /opt/nxp-real-time-edge/2.5/sysroots/armv8a-poky-linux/opt/ros/noetic/lib/libroscpp_serialization.so /opt/nxp-real-time-edge/2.5/sysroots/armv8a-poky-linux/opt/ros/noetic/lib/librostime.so /opt/nxp-real-time-edge/2.5/sysroots/armv8a-poky-linux/opt/ros/noetic/lib/libcpp_common.so
